prompt: Create a cinematic vertical photograph of a teenage schoolgirl walking toward the camera inside a dim concrete parking garage at dusk. She is centered slightly left, captured mid-stride with natural motion blur: long black hair whipping sideways, her right hand raised in front of her face so it partially hides her features, creating strong foreground occlusion. She wears a crisp white button-up shirt with sleeves slightly loose, a blue plaid necktie hanging casually, a dark navy pleated skirt, black knee-high socks, and black loafers; she carries a dark blazer or jacket bunched in her left arm. The environment is an empty multi-level garage with rough concrete floor, square pillars, low ceiling panels, exposed pipes, fluorescent strip lights overhead, and open sides showing a blue-purple evening sky and distant blurry parking-lot lights. Use a handheld candid fashion-photo feel, full-body framing from slightly below eye level, shallow depth of field, realistic physics in the clothing and hair, soft low-contrast lighting mixed with harsh fluorescent highlights, subtle film grain, muted colors, and a moody urban coming-of-age atmosphere. No text, no watermark, no posed studio look.
